trending_videos.title: Shakira, Burna Boy - Dai Dai (Official Video)
trending_videos.description:
Shakira, Burna Boy - Dai Dai (Official Video)
FIFA World Cup Official Song 2026

Music: https://songwhip.com/shakira/dai-dai

Letra/Lyrics: 
Oe oe e oe Oe oe e oe
You knew from the day you were born
That here in this place you belong
You been this brave all along
What broke you once made you strong

Dai dai iko
Dale allez lets go
Dai dai iko
Dale allez lets go!
Dai dai iko
Dale allez lets go
Dai dai iko
Dale allez lets go!

Come follow your desire
Theres a will there way
You are the owner of that fire
No one can take it away
Sweat and blood to write your story
That is how you paved the way
You are about to reach the glory
Only one step away

All the highs and lows
All the tears and the pain
You been there thru it all
Been thru it all
Just do it again
Now you got to believe (I believe)
Cuz you know what it takes
To be living the dream
At top of your game.

Feel it, got everything you needed
now bring it like you mean it
just like you mean it
Dale, no olvides lo que vales
Juega como tu s

trending_videos.title: Dead by Daylight | Jason | Official Trailer
trending_videos.description:
The mask is on. The machete is dripping. The massacre has begun.   
Dead by Daylight: Jason.  

06. 16. 26. 

Trapped forever in a realm of eldritch evil where even death is not an escape, four determined Survivors face a bloodthirsty Killer in a vicious game of nerve and wits. Pick a side and step into a world of tension and terror with horror gaming's best asymmetrical multiplayer.      

PLAY DEAD BY DAYLIGHT: https://buythegame.deadbydaylight.com/   

Join the official forum:  https://forums.bhvr.com/dead-by-daylight/

 Like and follow us on our official Social Media Channels:     
- Facebook:  https://facebook.com/DeadByDaylight
- Twitter:  https://twitter.com/DeadbyDaylight
- Instagram:  https://www.instagram.com/deadbydaylight/
- TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@deadbydaylight 

#DbD

trending_videos.title: The CJ Cup Byron Nelson, Third Round
trending_videos.description: The third round of the PGA Tour Byron Nelson gets underway at TPC Craig Ranch. The remaining contenders navigate Moving Day to make assertive leaderboard climbs and secure spots within the final Sunday groupings in McKinney, Texas.

musicAndEntertainment.observation: Music videos and entertainment content lead in viewership, as seen with Shakira's video.
musicAndEntertainment.actionableInsight: Invest in music collaborations with popular artists and promote through official video releases to capture audience interest.
musicAndEntertainment.dataPoint: Shakira's music video is one of the leading content types, indicating high audience engagement in music.

gaming.observation: Gaming trailers, especially those related to popular franchises like 'Dead by Daylight', are trending.
gaming.actionableInsight: Create engaging trailers and teasers for upcoming games or updates to leverage the gaming community's enthusiasm.
gaming.dataPoint: Two videos related to 'Dead by Daylight' suggest a strong interest in gaming content.

sports.observation: Sports content, particularly related to major tournaments, is trending.
sports.actionableInsight: Develop content around live sports events and highlight key moments to attract sports fans.
sports.dataPoint: Videos related to NCAA and SEC tournaments indicate a strong viewer base for college sports.

diversifiedContent.observation: Channels are engaging in multiple content types, from music to sports to trailers.
diversifiedContent.actionableInsight: Encourage content creators to diversify their offerings to capture a broader audience base.
diversifiedContent.dataPoint: Top channels like Shakira and Prime Video are not limited to a single content type.

frequencyAndEngagement.observation: Engagement is higher for channels that consistently release high-quality content.
frequencyAndEngagement.actionableInsight: Maintain a consistent content release schedule and engage with audiences through comments and community posts.
frequencyAndEngagement.dataPoint: Top channels maintain a steady release of content, keeping their audience engaged.

crossPromotion.observation: Cross-promotion between music, gaming, and sports content can harness overlapping audience interests.
crossPromotion.actionableInsight: Collaborate with creators across different genres to introduce content to new audiences and increase viewership.
crossPromotion.dataPoint: The presence of diverse content types provides a platform for cross-promotional opportunities.

emergingPlatforms.observation: Prime Video’s presence suggests growing opportunities for streaming platforms.
emergingPlatforms.actionableInsight: Explore partnerships with streaming platforms to expand content distribution and access new viewer segments.
emergingPlatforms.dataPoint: Prime Video's entry indicates the potential for streaming platforms in the trending video space.

analysis.note: Transcript analysis is more detailed, metadata analysis provides broader trends
